item.title: Trump renews Netanyahu pardon call, saying only Iran should be troubling him
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
JERUSALEM, March 5 - U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday called again on Israel's president to grant Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu a pardon for corruption charges, saying the premier should have nothing on his mind but the war with Iran.
Matched: corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Middle East chaos stems from erosion in international law, EU's Kallas says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ZURICH, March 5 - The current turmoil in the Middle East is a direct result of the erosion in international law, EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas said on Thursday.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US House of Representatives to vote on latest effort to halt Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Vote comes day after a parallel resolution failed in the Senate, underscoring Republican support for Trump-launched war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Czech parliament votes to shield PM Babis from trial on EU subsidy fraud charges
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
PRAGUE, March 5 - The lower house of the Czech parliament voted on Thursday to deny a court request for billionaire businessman and Prime Minister Andrej Babis to face trial in long-running prosecution over an alleged fraud in drawing a European Union subsidy.
Matched: parliament(+2), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Somali parliament backs constitutional changes that could extend president's term
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOGADISHU, March 5 - Somalia's parliament has backed constitutional changes that could extend the president's term in office by a year and push back planned elections.
Matched: parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel warns people to leave Beirut's southern suburbs
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/JERUSALEM, March 5 - Israel warned residents to leave Beirut's southern suburbs, including Hezbollah-controlled areas, on Thursday, prompting an exodus from a swathe of the capital known as Dahiyeh which a far-right Israeli minister said would soon resemble parts of Gaza.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Europol warns Iran crisis raises threat of terror, extremism and cyberattacks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MADRID, March 5 - The Middle East conflict will have \"immediate repercussions\" for European Union security with an increased threat of terrorism, serious and organised crime as well as violent extremism and cyberattacks, European police body Europol told Spanish news agency EFE on Thursday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine, Russia free 200 POWs each in latest swap amid stalled peace talks
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Exchange comes amid a deadlock in US-brokered negotiations to end the four-year war between the two countries.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: EU’s Kallas says Iran is seeking to escalate conflict
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ZURICH, March 5 - Iran is seeking to escalate the conflict in the Middle East by attacking other countries in the region indiscriminately, EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas said on Thursday.
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Anti-war protester injured in Capitol Hill struggle with US Senator Tim Sheehy
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The former Marine's hand was broken as police and Senator Sheehy tried to remove him.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: France ramps up military aid to Lebanon as Macron calls on Hezbollah, Israel to halt attacks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
PARIS, March 5 - France will strengthen its cooperation with the Lebanese Armed Forces and provide armored transport vehicles as well as operational and logistical support, French President Emmanuel Macron said on Thursday, as Lebanon was pulled deeper into the war in the Middle East earlier this week.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iranians ‘ready to disgrace’ US troops if they invade, top official says
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Amid ongoing war with Iran, Trump says he aims to be 'involved in the appointment' of the country's next supreme leader.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Number of Iranian missiles and drones fired at Gulf countries
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 5 - Here are statistics released by Gulf defence ministries on drones and missiles that Iran has fired at their territories since the start of the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran:
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump ousts Kristi Noem, who oversaw aggressive immigration crackdown
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Ms Noem will leave her post as homeland security chief at the end of the month.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Iceland to propose holding EU referendum during autumn, broadcaster RUV reports
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
STOCKHOLM, March 5 - Iceland's government will propose to its parliament to hold a referendum during the autumn on whether to resume European Union accession talks abandoned more than a decade ago, public broadcaster RUV reported on Thursday, citing sources.
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: WHO says it has verified 13 attacks on health sites in Iran
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
GENEVA, March 5 - The World Health Organization chief said on Thursday that it has verified 13 attacks on health infrastructure in Iran amid a U.S.-Israeli campaign and it was checking reports that four healthcare workers were killed and 25 others injured.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Russia jails Romanian citizen for 15 years for spying for Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOSCOW, March 5 - A Romanian man was convicted of spying for Ukraine and sentenced by a Russian court on Thursday to 15 years in prison, the court in the southern region of Krasnodar said.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Our children were sold off’: The South Africans sent to fight Russia’s war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Men 'lured' into fighting in the Ukraine war say Africans were subjected to worse treatment on the front lines.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: While US encourages Kurds to attack Iran, history serves darker warning
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Kurds weigh Washington's push for a rebellion on Iranian soil against a history of betrayals and pragmatic alliances.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iranian warship sunk by the US was sailing home after taking part in an exhibition hosted by India
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Woman Claims TSA ‘Forced’ Her to Go Through Airport Security Scanner, Allegedly ‘Destroying’ Her Spinal Cord Implant: Lawsuit
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine's military drone guru says the next phase of Russia's Shahed war will be all about new extreme speeds
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Pope Leo XIV issues warning to priests after noticing problematic trend in sermons: 'The brain needs to be used'
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US mulls new rules for AI chip exports, including requiring investments by foreign firms in US
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Matched: ai(+3)
